# Acme Warm · Brand Spec (auto-generated)

> **Description:** Editorial-forward warm theme for Korean B2B lecture decks — warm off-white paper with orange-600 accent and Noto Sans KR.

## Color Tokens

| Token | Hex | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `--bg` | `#FFF8F0` | page background |
| `--surface` | `#FFFFFF` | card / container |
| `--surface-alt` | `#FAF3E8` | grouped block |
| `--text` | `#1A1410` | primary text |
| `--text-secondary` | `#6B5A4F` | body secondary |
| `--text-tertiary` | `#A89890` | captions |
| `--border` | `#E8DFD4` | dividers / card edges |
| `--border-strong` | `#D4C8B8` | strong dividers |
| `--accent` | `#FF6B35` | primary accent (use 1–2 events / slide) |
| `--accent-soft` | `#FFEDE0` | accent-tinted bg |
| `--accent-ink` | `#C04818` | accent pressed |
| `--positive` | `#2E7D32` | growth (data only) |
| `--negative` | `#C62828` | decline (data only) |
| `--warning` | `#E65100` | caution (data only) |

## Typography

- **Font chain:** `'Noto Sans KR', 'Apple SD Gothic Neo', 'Malgun Gothic', sans-serif`
- **Display** 56px / 800
- **Headline** 32px / 700
- **Title** 18.4px / 600
- **Body** 15.2px / 400
- **Caption** 12.8px / 500

## Voice

- **Tone:** warm, practical, conversational-but-precise
- **POV:** second-person direct (Korean존댓말)
- **Register:** Korean B2B lecture / workshop
- **Forbidden phrases:** "킹왕짱", "혁신적인", "압도적"
- **GM style hint:** One action-oriented sentence starting with a verb (가져가세요, 기억하세요, 시도하세요).

## Assets

- **Icon pack (default):** tabler-outline
